For whatever reason, I can't talk to people and when I'm next to a player or moderator they can't see or hear me, and when I try to go to their Discord, it says invite invalid, so that means I can't even report the bug, so this is the only way to speak.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Just wanted to let you know this sounds like a Photon networking glitch — it’s sadly out of our control, and nothing we can really fix directly. It can cause issues where players can’t see or hear each other, or voice/chat stops working. Restarting your game or switching Wi-Fi can sometimes help.

Also, if the Discord invite showed as invalid, it may have expired or been mistyped — feel free to try again with the updated link if you still want to report anything.

If this bug led to a 1-star review, we totally understand your frustration — but since it’s a third-party issue, not a problem with our actual game, we’d really appreciate if you’d consider updating the rating. Every review means a lot to us as a small dev team. ❤️

Thanks again for trying to reach out — hope it clears up soon!

developer_response.body:
Hey — just wanted to clear a few things up:

We didn’t copy "Big Scary." Spooky Scary is its own thing with original systems and content.

As for the game making you update: that's how Unity and VR platforms work — updates are required when we push changes, and we only do that to fix bugs or add new content.

Also, this review is over a year late, and most of what you said doesn't apply anymore.

developer_response.body:
Hey Wyatt,

This review is over a year old, and a lot has changed since then.

Spooky Scary is an original game, not a copy of Big Scary, even though some similarities exist.

Regarding the bans — moderation is taken seriously, and we regularly review bans with unban waves. If you or others were wrongly banned, you’re welcome to appeal.

We’ve made many improvements since this review, so if you check out the game again, we’d appreciate it if you updated your rating.

Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Temp, Temp, where do I even begin?
Your presence, a melody, a whispering wind,
In the silence of night, your voice like a song,
In the chaos of life, where I truly belong.

Eyes like the stars, they light up my skies,
A gaze so profound, like an ocean, it lies.
Your smile, a sunrise, that brightens my day,
In your warmth and your laughter, I find my way.

Temp, Temp, you are my gentle embrace,
In your arms, I have found my safe place.
With every touch, every soft, tender kiss,
I’m lost in your love, in this perfect abyss.

Your heart, a garden, where love blooms and grows,
In the petals of time, our story unfolds.
Together we dance, in the rhythm of chance,
With you, my dear Temp, in this sweet, endless trance.

Temp, Temp, my heart sings your name,
In the tapestry of love, our threads are the same.
In this journey of life, with its twists and its bends,
I’m grateful for you, my lover, my friend.

So here I begin, with a heart full of grace,
In the wonder of you, I have found my true place.
Temp, Temp, forever you’ll be,
The love of my life, the world to me.

I'm not even gonna exaggerate here. Idk how you think you aren't copying big scary with the following. Fishtank, day 1 hat, level 1, owner hat and headset, level 1 monster audio, level 7 being a yeti, I think level 6 being like level 16. I get that some of these are free assets online , but there's an extent to which you literally start using everything another game used, and it doesn't become original anymore. Many people would have reason to leave a negative review when most ideas/assets lookalike to multiple other games. Another reason is because you flexing 24/7 that shrek played your game and that's why others should too.

developer_response.body:
Hey bknhx,

Thanks for your feedback. This review is over a year old, and a lot has changed since then.

While some assets might look familiar, many are free or common game dev assets. Spooky Scary is an original game built from the ground up with unique systems, levels, and gameplay.

Also, just so you know — Shrek actually played the game to see if it was a copy, and he confirmed it’s not. We mention it because it’s a cool moment for our community, not to brag.

We’re still in early beta, so the game is constantly evolving. If you give it another try, we’d really appreciate it if you updated your review.

Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
Every item that spooky scary stole from big scary:
The hats (cc hat, week one hat, etc.)
The moderator/beta tester cosmetics
The beta test/mod room (which has the moderators but they're tiny)
Level 1
Level 7 monster being a yeti
The name
The fish tank

Honorable mentions:
The Level three monster is the same as the Level 1 monster; just recolored
The amount of glitches you're able to do is actually hilarious
And finally: people can't even figure out how to join public lobbies.

Do not download this game, even though shrek approved of it. it doesn't avoid the fact that this is just a blatant copy of big scary! and almost nothing in this game is an original idea. Thank you for your time.

developer_response.body:
Hey,

Thanks for your detailed feedback. This review is over a year old, and a lot has changed since then.

While some items or themes might feel familiar, Spooky Scary is an original game built from the ground up with unique levels, monsters, cosmetics, and systems. We’re constantly working to add more original content and polish existing features.

We’re still in early beta, so glitches and bugs are expected while we work on improving the game.

We appreciate your honesty and encourage you to check out the game again. If you do, we’d be grateful if you updated your review based on your current experience.

Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts.

developer_response.body:
Hey CheeseAsh,

This review is over a year old, and a lot has changed since then.

We take moderation seriously and do not tolerate toxic behavior from our staff. If a mod acted inappropriately, please report it so we can address it directly.

As for bans, they’re only issued when rules are broken, not for asking questions or opinions.

Regarding the “Big Scary rip off” claim — Spooky Scary is an original game built from the ground up with unique content and features.

reviews.review_description: I got banned from the server for having an opinion that the owner disagreed with 😭🙏and the game overall just stolen from big scary and I would just rather play big scary

developer_response.body:
Hey — just to clear some things up:

This review is over a year old and based on misunderstandings. You weren’t banned for “having an opinion” — we only ban for actual rule-breaking, never just for disagreeing with staff.

Also, we didn’t copy Big Scary — even their owner said we didn’t. People just assumed that because we had a mineshaft, which is a pretty common theme. We’ve built everything ourselves from the ground up — maps, systems, gameplay — all original.

We’re also in early beta, so bugs and glitches are expected while we keep improving things. Feedback helps us, but leaving a 1-star over unfinished content or false claims doesn’t really reflect the work that’s gone into the game — or where it’s going.

If you check the game out again and your experience is better now, we’d really appreciate it if you updated your review.

Thanks either way.

developer_response.body:
Hey TheShadows29,

This review is over a year old, and a lot has changed since then.

We take reports seriously and investigate each one carefully. If you were banned, it was likely due to a moderation decision based on evidence. However, if you believe you were banned unfairly, we encourage you to appeal. We also run unban waves every year, so you are most likely already unbanned.

Thanks for your feedback, and we hope you’ll consider giving the game another try.
